prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Cation: charge +1, multiplicity 2; Anion: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Geometry taken from the user-supplied acrolein.xyz without re-optimization. All SCFs converged; charge conservation checks passed (Σf⁺ = 1.0000, Σf⁻ = 1.0000). No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true.

Most electrophilic site: Atom 4 (C, β-carbon), f⁺ = 0.64232102.
Most nucleophilic site: Atom 1 (O), f⁻ = 0.39388616.

Full per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor):
  O   : f⁺=0.40136419, f⁻=0.39388616, f⁰=0.39762517, Δf= 0.0074780351
  C(2): f⁺=0.022255106, f⁻=0.0059884353, f⁰=0.01412177, Δf=0.01626667
  C(3): f⁺=0.43404673, f⁻=0.091403097, f⁰=0.26272491, Δf=0.34264363
  C(4): f⁺=0.64232102, f⁻=0.087369815, f⁰=0.36484542, Δf=0.5549512
  H(5): f⁺=−0.1572595, f⁻=0.085961423, f⁰=−0.03564904, Δf=−0.24322092
  H(6): f⁺=−0.2072029, f⁻=0.1856796, f⁰=−0.010761648, Δf=−0.39288251
  H(7): f⁺=−0.062116996, f⁻=0.084485809, f⁰=0.011184406, Δf=−0.14660281
  H(8): f⁺=−0.073407645, f⁻=0.065225658, f⁰=−0.004090993, Δf=−0.1386333

The headline value reported is f⁺ for the most electrophilic atom (C-β, atom 4).
